- Pulisic, AC Milan to debut new kit for Champions League push: With United States star Christian Pulisic front and center, Serie A giants AC Milan have unveiled their new home kit for the 2026-27 season. The table context matters here: title pressure, European qualification, relegation risk and fixture congestion can all change how this story is read.
